tools.description: Performs a web search using Google Search (via the Gemini API) and returns the results. This tool is useful for finding information on the internet based on a query.

query.description: The search query to find information on the web.

tools.name: google_search

text.description: The grounded response text formatted as Markdown, with inline citation markers and an appended Sources section when available.

index.description: The 1-based citation index shown in the response text.

title.description: The title of the cited source.

uri.description: The source URL or canonical URI.

sources.description: The sources referenced by the grounded response.
